title: Jamaican Hangover Casserole
description: A spicy twist on a classic comfort food, this Jamaican Hangover Casserole is perfect for a hearty breakfast or brunch.
instructions: Brown the Hangover Meat in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the Jamaican Cure, Onion, Garlic, and Bell Pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Stir in the Fodmap Friendly Casserole and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together the Dish Crumbly Topping and Fatty Coconut Oil.
Sprinkle the topping evenly over the casserole mixture.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the casserole rest for 10-15 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
